text.content: MAXAM Set to Supply Its Agricultural Tires to CASE IH

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Set to Supply Its Agricultural Tires to CASE IH

text.content: October 11th, 2022 – FRANKFURT, DE – MAXAM Tire Europe is proud to announce that the AGRIXTRA range of agricultural tires has been approved on select CASE IH Luxxum, Maxxum, and Puma tractors.

rich_text.plain_text: October 11th, 2022 – FRANKFURT, DE – MAXAM Tire Europe is proud to announce that the AGRIXTRA range of agricultural tires has been approved on select CASE IH Luxxum, Maxxum, and Puma tractors.

text.content: Gaining another supply agreement with the global major equipment manufacturer CNHI, MAXAM is pleased to provide the AGRIXTRA business solution to CASE IH. Achieving an agricultural equipment manufacturer’s (OEM) approval is a major milestone for the MAXAM brand since the launch of the AGRIXTRA series in 2014.

rich_text.plain_text: Gaining another supply agreement with the global major equipment manufacturer CNHI, MAXAM is pleased to provide the AGRIXTRA business solution to CASE IH. Achieving an agricultural equipment manufacturer’s (OEM) approval is a major milestone for the MAXAM brand since the launch of the AGRIXTRA series in 2014.

text.content: “The homologation, approval, and commercialization of our radial agricultural tires is a significant step in the evolution of the MAXAM brand as a long-term supplier to CNH Industrial and Agriculture,” says Kevin Buckley MAXAM OE Sales Director Europe.

rich_text.plain_text: “The homologation, approval, and commercialization of our radial agricultural tires is a significant step in the evolution of the MAXAM brand as a long-term supplier to CNH Industrial and Agriculture,” says Kevin Buckley MAXAM OE Sales Director Europe.

text.content: The MAXAM AGRIXTRA range of radial tires has built a formidable reputation for performance and value engendering exceptional customer feedback. Offering improved traction, increased stability, and reduced slip, the AGRIXTRA family of products delivers a valuable solution to farmers and growers globally.

rich_text.plain_text: The MAXAM AGRIXTRA range of radial tires has built a formidable reputation for performance and value engendering exceptional customer feedback. Offering improved traction, increased stability, and reduced slip, the AGRIXTRA family of products delivers a valuable solution to farmers and growers globally.

text.content: Engineered to deliver superior performance on the road and in the field.

rich_text.plain_text: Engineered to deliver superior performance on the road and in the field.

text.content: The 45° lug design ensures the best profile for superior traction & minimal vibration through constant lug contact.

rich_text.plain_text: The 45° lug design ensures the best profile for superior traction & minimal vibration through constant lug contact.

text.content: The tread stability delivers increased comfort, improved handling, and durability.

rich_text.plain_text: The tread stability delivers increased comfort, improved handling, and durability.

text.content: The optimized self-cleaning design and carrying capacity conquer heavy loads and/or heavy plowing operations.

rich_text.plain_text: The optimized self-cleaning design and carrying capacity conquer heavy loads and/or heavy plowing operations.

text.content: Approved in twenty-seven tire sizes in the 85, 70, 65, and XL series, CASE IH Tractors are now available for purchase with MAXAM’s AGRIXTRA radial tires in sizes 24-42 inches in diameter. All MAXAM radial agricultural tires are backed by an 8-year tire warranty, highlighting MAXAM’s confidence in its product offering. For more information on MAXAM’s supply agreement with CASE IH, please contact your local representative or visit us at maxamtire.com.
